tasks.description: Define mandatory ROS setup loading behavior for the Python wrapper startup.

steps.description: Define ROS_DISTRO resolution order with default value humble.
Define setup file discovery for /opt/ros/<distro>/setup.bash path.
Define failure output contract for missing ROS setup file.

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Wrapper startup must always attempt ROS environment loading before Python execution. ROS distro selection must default to humble when ROS_DISTRO is unset. Missing /opt/ros/<distro>/setup.bash must return non-zero exit code with explicit failure message.

unit: Given ROS_DISTRO is unset, bootstrap logic resolves distro value to humble.
Given ROS_DISTRO=foxy and /opt/ros/foxy/setup.bash exists, bootstrap logic selects that exact file path.
Given selected setup path is absent, bootstrap logic emits one failure line and returns non-zero status.

tasks.task: Integrate ROS Bootstrap Into Python Wrapper
tasks.description: Update the agent Python wrapper so uv-run Python always inherits ROS Python paths.

steps.description: Insert bootstrap call before constructing final uv run command execution.
Preserve current CLI argument forwarding contract for wrapper invocations.
Preserve current --print-paths diagnostics output contract for wrapper users.
Add diagnostics lines for resolved ROS distro plus setup status.

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Wrapper must source /opt/ros/<distro>/setup.bash before uv execution on every run. Wrapper must execute Python with the exact command uv run --no-sync python. uv-run Python must inherit ROS-related environment variables including PYTHONPATH. Wrapper must fail fast when ROS setup cannot be loaded. --print-paths output must include ROS setup status details.

unit: With mocked environment map from Task 'Design ROS Environment Bootstrap Logic', command builder prepends ROS setup call before uv run invocation.
With mock command assembly input, built execution command equals literal uv run --no-sync python before forwarded args.
With mock CLI args ['script.py','--flag','value'], wrapper forwards args unchanged after bootstrap stage.
With mock missing setup result from Task 'Design ROS Environment Bootstrap Logic', wrapper exits non-zero without building uv run command.
With mock successful setup result from Task 'Design ROS Environment Bootstrap Logic', diagnostics formatter includes distro name and setup success marker.
integration: Connect wrapper with real bootstrap logic from Task 'Design ROS Environment Bootstrap Logic' and verify ROS_DISTRO=humble loads /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash when present.
Connect wrapper with real bootstrap logic from Task 'Design ROS Environment Bootstrap Logic' and verify child uv Python process prints inherited ROS PYTHONPATH segments.
Connect wrapper with real bootstrap logic from Task 'Design ROS Environment Bootstrap Logic' and verify missing ROS setup file returns non-zero exit code.
e2e-manual: Run a representative ROS-aware Python entry via ./agent_bins/python and confirm runtime imports ROS Python modules.
